decisions.summary: Chunk-level (message-level) index, not session-level. Phase 2 adds a NEW sidecar index of conversation message chunks with byte offsets, distinct from the existing session-level enrichment-summary embeddings in src/lib/database/discovered-sessions-db.ts (topKCosine/loadEmbeddings) which embed whole-session summaries. The existing session search stays untouched; Phase 2 is additive.

Sidecar DB at ~/.panopticon/conversations/embeddings.db holds three things: (a) an FTS5 table over chunk text for BM25, (b) per-chunk embedding vectors stored as BLOBs, (c) a per-file index-state table (jsonlPath -> {lastByteOffset, mtime, size}) for incremental/idempotent indexing.

AUTO-DECISION (revisit at b1 inspection): prefer brute-force JS cosine over BLOB-stored embeddings (reusing the existing loadEmbeddings/cosine pattern already proven in src/lib/conversations/search.ts) rather than adding the sqlite-vec native extension. The issue says 'sqlite-vec (or comparable)'; brute-force cosine over a single user's local chunk corpus is well within budget (<1s for ~100k chunks) and avoids a new native-addon build/load surface. The b1 foundation bead requiresInspection=deep so a reviewer can mandate sqlite-vec if scale or policy demands.

Hybrid ranking = FTS5 BM25 over chunk text + vector cosine, fused by Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), matching closed #185. Excerpts reuse the EXACT same marker convention as memory excerpts in routes/palette.ts: open=U+2987 (⦇), close=U+2988 (⦈), rendered by the existing excerptSegments renderer in CommandPalette.tsx. No HTML injection.

Default embedding model OpenAI text-embedding-3-small via the existing pluggable embed()/EmbeddingProviderName abstraction in src/lib/conversations/. Provider/model/apiKey/enabled live under a conversation-search section of ~/.panopticon/config.yaml; semantic search can be disabled entirely (the palette then returns an empty conversations array, no regressions to Phase 1 groups).

Search surface = extend the existing GET /api/palette/search?q=&limit= in src/dashboard/server/routes/palette.ts to add a `conversations` array; do NOT add a new RPC. Frontend adds a `Conversations` group ABOVE `Memory` in CommandPalette.tsx result order and reuses the excerpt renderer.

Run in AUTO planning mode: no live human is attached to this planning tmux session, and the issue body is highly prescriptive (scope, storage path, default model, marker convention, response shape are all specified). Consequential-but-licensed choices (D3) are recorded as autoDecisions and gated by b1 inspection rather than blocking on AskUserQuestion.

Scope guard: do NOT touch the `/` SearchModal issue flow, do NOT add codebase semantic search, do NOT add a `pan` CLI verb. Phase 2 is dashboard-only and additive. Existing Phase 1 palette groups (commands/memory/observations/issues) must be regression-free.

hazards.summary: byteOffset accuracy across appended JSONL writes. JSONL session files are appended live; byteOffset must be the absolute byte position of the message's line in the file AT INDEX TIME and must remain valid for later 'open-at-message' resolution. Multi-byte UTF-8 means byte offset != char offset.
hazards.mitigation: Chunker computes byteOffset by summing Buffer.byteLength of consumed lines (not string length). b3 tests assert byte-offset correctness specifically after a simulated append. Incremental indexer keys idempotency on (jsonlPath, byteOffset) and only processes bytes beyond the stored lastByteOffset.

hazards.summary: Open-conversation-at-message: the conversation drawer/viewer may key on message index, not byte offset. The selected chunk gives sessionId+byteOffset; the drawer must resolve that to the right message and scroll to it.
hazards.mitigation: b12 resolves byteOffset -> message by re-reading the JSONL and mapping cumulative byte length to a message index/anchor, then scrolls. Confirm the drawer component name and its scroll/anchor API during b12 (research found conversation components under src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/; the ConversationView/drawer is the integration point). If the drawer cannot accept an anchor, add a minimal scroll-to-anchor prop.

hazards.summary: Embedding cost / accidental large reindex. A full reindex of all historical JSONL could embed millions of tokens and cost real money against the user's OpenAI key.
hazards.mitigation: b14 cost-estimate endpoint computes estimated tokens x model price; b16 frontend requires explicit confirm when estimate > $1. Incremental indexing (b5) is the default path so a dashboard restart never re-embeds (uses per-file index state).

hazards.summary: JSONL files are sacred (CLAUDE.md) - indexing must be strictly read-only over ~/.claude/projects/**.jsonl. Never write, truncate, or move a session file.
hazards.mitigation: Chunker and indexer open JSONL read-only (createReadStream). All writes go ONLY to the sidecar ~/.panopticon/conversations/embeddings.db. b9 integration test uses a fixture session copied into a temp dir; never mutates real session files.

hazards.summary: sqlite extension/native-addon risk if sqlite-vec is chosen at inspection. Loading a native sqlite extension under the dashboard's Node-22 runtime can fail per-platform.
hazards.mitigation: Default path (D3) avoids the extension entirely. If b1 inspection mandates sqlite-vec, that bead must verify extension load under `node dist/dashboard/server.js` (Node 22), not Bun, before downstream beads proceed.

hazards.summary: Provider disabled / missing API key must degrade gracefully, not 500 the whole palette search (which also serves memory/observations/summaries).
hazards.mitigation: b8 wraps conversation search in try/catch and returns conversations:[] on missing key/disabled/embedding-error, leaving Phase 1 groups intact. b9 includes a 'disabled -> empty conversations, other groups present' assertion.

sessionHistory.note: Initial planning session for PAN-1395 (Phase 2 Ctrl+K semantic conversation search). Researched Phase 1 palette (CommandPalette.tsx, routes/palette.ts) and existing session-level conversation search (src/lib/conversations/search.ts, discovered-sessions-db.ts). Authored 16-bead plan in auto mode.
